2606.30259.title: Multi-Agentic System Leveraging Open-Source LLMs to Mitigate Disinformation Threats
2606.30259.paper_summary: In contemporary societies, the threat of disinformation has reached alarming levels, exacerbated by the proliferation of electronic communication, social media, and advancements in artificial intelligence. As a result, there is an urgent need to develop effective countermeasures to mitigate this menace. However, the sheer scale of the problem renders manual fact-checking and human-based verification inadequate, underscoring the necessity for automated methods to detect and debunk disinformation. This article proposes a novel approach based on a multi-agent system that emulates the decision-making processes of human annotators engaged in disinformation detection tasks. By incorporating a consensus mechanism, diversity in cognition and diversity in knowledge, and also hierarchical structure, inspired by human annotators' behavior, the proposed method achieves superior results compared to individual Large Language Models (LLMs), including GPT 4 and GPT 3.5. The system leverages open models (e.g., LLaMA, Kimi, Qwen, Deepseek and LLaMA-Nemotron) to ensure greater transparency. The evaluation of the proposed method encompasses datasets in languages with varying resource availability, including English (high-resource), Polish (medium-resource), Slovak (low-resource) and Bulgarian (low-resource). Experiments were conducted on tasks such as direct disinformation detection, identification of texts worthy of verification, and detection of texts containing verifiable factual claims.
2606.30259.paper_summary_zh: 在當代社會，虛假資訊的威脅已達到令人擔憂的程度，這一情況因電子通信、社交媒體的普及以及人工智慧的進步而加劇。因此，迫切需要制定有效的對策來減輕這一威脅。然而，問題的龐大規模使得人工事實核查和基於人類的驗證變得不足，突顯出自動化方法檢測和揭穿虛假資訊的必要性。本文提出了一種基於多代理系統的新方法，該系統模擬參與虛假資訊檢測任務的人類標註者的決策過程。通過納入共識機制、認知多樣性和知識多樣性，以及受人類標註者行為啟發的層級結構，所提出的方法在效果上超過了包括 GPT 4 和 GPT 3.5 在內的個別大型語言模型（LLMs）。該系統利用開放模型（例如 LLaMA、Kimi、Qwen、Deepseek 和 LLaMA-Nemotron）以確保更大的透明度。所提出方法的評估涵蓋了資源可用性不同的語言數據集，包括英語（高資源）、波蘭語（中資源）、斯洛伐克語（低資源）和保加利亞語（低資源）。實驗針對直接虛假資訊檢測、值得驗證的文本識別以及包含可驗證事實主張的文本檢測等任務進行。
2606.30259.author: Sebastian Kula et.al.
